examples: Because they cannot verbalize or fill out questionnaires, indirect techniques of naturalistic observation are used as the primary means of determining what infants can see, hear, feel, and so forth.
Watch out for how they verbalize with others.
Feelings are often very difficult for you to verbalize.
Some people verbalize their stories while others write them down.
Ms. YVETTE HOWARD (Resident, Texas): And my second concern - I almost hate to verbalize it - is - I hesitate to say it - but that he would be assassinated.
